not_off_grid_mode.reason: This action is only valid outside Off-Grid mode.

capabilities.change_summary: Changes the inverter output topology mode reported by the Anenji 600+ configuration block.
capabilities.note: Output mode according to the Anenji protocol 4 configuration block.

capabilities.change_summary: Changes how the inverter prioritizes PV, battery, and utility when powering the load.
capabilities.note: Output source priority according to the Anenji 600+ configuration block.

choices.label: PV-Utility-Battery
choices.description: Prefer PV first, then utility, then battery.

choices.label: PV-Battery-Utility
choices.description: Prefer PV first, then battery, then utility.

choices.label: PV-Utility-Battery (Grid-Tied PV)
choices.description: Prefer PV first with grid-tied PV behavior enabled.

capabilities.title: Force Eq Charge
capabilities.change_summary: Starts one manual battery equalization cycle immediately.
capabilities.note: Write register 656 with value 1 to force one equalization charge cycle.

capabilities.title: Input Mode
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the AC input operating mode used by the inverter.
capabilities.note: Input mode according to the Anenji extended system register set.
Buzzer mode according to the Anenji extended system register set.
LCD backlight behavior according to the Anenji extended system register set.
LCD auto-return behavior according to the Anenji extended system register set.
Power saving flag according to the Anenji extended system register set.
Overload restart flag according to the Anenji extended system register set.
Over-temperature restart flag according to the Anenji extended system register set.
Overload bypass flag according to the Anenji extended system register set.

capabilities.title: External CT Enabled
capabilities.change_summary: Controls whether the external current transformer input is enabled.
capabilities.note: External CT enable flag according to the Anenji extended system register set.

capabilities.title: Warning Mask I
capabilities.change_summary: Changes which warning bits are allowed to appear on the inverter.
capabilities.note: Write registers 687..688 as a high-word-first unsigned 32-bit mask; bits set to 0 are blocked and bits set to 1 are shown normally.

capabilities.title: Dry Contact
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the operating mode of the dry-contact output.
capabilities.note: Dry contact mode according to the Anenji extended system register set.

capabilities.title: Automatic Mains Output
capabilities.change_summary: Controls whether AC output starts automatically when the power button is not pressed.
capabilities.note: Automatic mains output enable flag according to the Anenji extended system register set.

choices.label: Manual Start Required
choices.description: Do not enable AC output automatically.

choices.label: Automatic Output Enabled
choices.description: Allow AC output to start automatically.

capabilities.title: PV Grid-Connected Max Power
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the maximum power allowed for PV grid-connected operation.
capabilities.note: PV grid-connected maximum power in whole watts, limited to the rated power of this 11 kW model.

capabilities.title: Island Detection Enabled
capabilities.change_summary: Controls whether island detection is enabled.
capabilities.note: Island detection enable flag according to the Anenji extended system register set.
Turn-on mode according to the Anenji extended system register set.

capabilities.change_summary: Requests remote turn-on through the Anenji extended remote control register.
capabilities.note: Write register 694 with value 1 to request remote turn-on.

capabilities.change_summary: Requests remote shutdown through the Anenji extended remote control register.
capabilities.note: Write register 694 with value 0 to request remote shutdown.

capabilities.change_summary: Sends the inverter command that exits the fault lock state when supported by the current fault condition.
capabilities.note: Write register 695 with value 1 to request exit from the fault lock state.

capabilities.title: Inverter Date Write
capabilities.change_summary: Writes the inverter date registers from a YYYY-MM-DD value.
capabilities.note: Write registers 696..698 with year, month, and day values.

capabilities.title: Inverter Time Write
capabilities.change_summary: Writes the inverter time registers from an HH:MM:SS value.
capabilities.note: Write registers 699..701 with hour, minute, and second values.

capabilities.title: Ground Relay Enabled
capabilities.change_summary: Controls whether the ground relay is enabled.
capabilities.note: Ground relay enable flag according to the Anenji extended system register set.

capabilities.title: Lithium Battery Activation Time
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the lithium battery activation time.
capabilities.note: Lithium battery activation time in minutes according to the Anenji extended system register set.

capabilities.title: Clear Generation Data
capabilities.change_summary: Clears the inverter's stored generation counters.
capabilities.note: Write register 705 with value 0xAA to clear all generation data.

capabilities.title: Reset User Parameters
capabilities.change_summary: Restores user parameters to their defaults when the inverter is not in Off-Grid mode.
capabilities.note: Write register 706 with value 0xAA to reset user parameters to their defaults.

capabilities.title: Battery Type
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the battery chemistry profile.
capabilities.note: Battery type according to the Anenji 630+ configuration block.
Battery equalization enable flag according to the Anenji 650+ configuration block.
Raw unsigned percent threshold from the Anenji 640+ configuration block.
Raw unsigned percent threshold from the Anenji 640+ configuration block.
Raw unsigned percent threshold from the Anenji 650+ configuration block.
Charge source priority according to the Anenji 630+ configuration block.

choices.label: PV Priority
choices.description: Prefer PV charging when solar power is available.

choices.label: PV and Utility
choices.description: Allow both PV and utility charging.

choices.label: PV Priority With Load Reserve
choices.description: Prefer PV charging while reserving PV for the load when needed.
